tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — algo constants, base provider methods, config setting
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land strictly additive scaffolding. No behavior change.

**Files:**
- pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py (add RESOLVED_NOTE, RESOLVED_BODY_MARKER)
- pr_agent/git_providers/git_provider.py:341-360 (add resolve_review_thread, unresolve_review_thread defaults)
- pr_agent/settings/configuration.toml (add resolve_outdated_inline_comments = true)
- tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup_constants.py (NEW)

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup_constants.py tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v` → all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/algo/inline_comments_dedup.py", "pr_agent/git_providers/git_provider.py", "pr_agent/settings/configuration.toml", "tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup_constants.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_inline_comments_dedup_constants.py tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RESOLVED_NOTE and RESOLVED_BODY_MARKER importable", "Base resolve_review_thread and unresolve_review_thread return False", "configuration.toml declares resolve_outdated_inline_comments = true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: GitHub — switch get_bot_review_comments to GraphQL; add resolve/unresolve methods
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace REST-backed get_bot_review_comments with GraphQL pullRequest.reviewThreads query exposing thread_id + is_resolved. Add resolveReviewThread / unresolveReviewThread mutations.

**Files:**
- pr_agent/git_providers/github_provider.py:561-608
- tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py (rewrite TestGetBotReviewCommentsFiltering; add TestGitHubResolveUnresolve)

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v` → all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/git_providers/github_provider.py", "tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GraphQL-backed get_bot_review_comments returns thread_id + is_resolved", "Pagination honored", "Author filtering preserved", "resolve_review_thread uses resolveReviewThread mutation", "unresolve_review_thread uses unresolveReviewThread mutation", "errors array or exception returns [] / False"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GitHub — wire outdated pass into publish_code_suggestions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** After the dedup loop, resolve threads whose marker hash is in existing but not in emitted. Re-open threads when a previously-resolved suggestion comes back.

**Files:**
- pr_agent/git_providers/github_provider.py:610-695
- tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py (extend _set_mode helper; add TestOutdatedPass)

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v` → all pass including 8 new TestOutdatedPass tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/git_providers/github_provider.py", "tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_github_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Outdated comment triggers resolve + body-edit with RESOLVED_NOTE and RESOLVED_BODY_MARKER", "Already-resolved comments are skipped", "Body-marker signals user-unresolve and skips", "Re-emit after prior resolve triggers unresolve", "Setting false skips outdated pass", "persistent_inline_comments off skips outdated pass", "resolve failure skips note edit", "No exception propagates"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: GitLab — extend get_bot_review_comments with is_resolved; add resolve/unresolve methods
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add is_resolved + thread_id to the per-note dict. Implement resolve_review_thread / unresolve_review_thread via discussion.resolved = True/False; save().

**Files:**
- pr_agent/git_providers/gitlab_provider.py:667-732
- tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py (add TestGitLabResolveUnresolve, TestGetBotReviewCommentsIncludesIsResolved)

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v` → all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/git_providers/gitlab_provider.py", "tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["is_resolved included in get_bot_review_comments dicts", "thread_id added (discussion_id kept as alias)", "resolve_review_thread sets resolved=True and calls save()", "unresolve_review_thread sets resolved=False and calls save()", "Non-resolvable discussions return False without save", "Exceptions return False with warning log"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: GitLab — wire outdated pass into publish_code_suggestions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mirror Task 2 for GitLab: track emitted hashes, outdated pass after dedup loop, unresolve on re-emit.

**Files:**
- pr_agent/git_providers/gitlab_provider.py:734-end-of-publish_code_suggestions
- tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py (extend _set_mode helper; add TestGitLabOutdatedPass)

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v` → all pass including 7 new TestGitLabOutdatedPass tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pr_agent/git_providers/gitlab_provider.py", "tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/unittest/test_gitlab_inline_dedup.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Outdated comment triggers resolve + body-edit", "Already-resolved skipped", "Body-marker skip", "Re-emit after prior resolve triggers unresolve", "Setting false skips outdated pass", "persistent_inline_comments off skips outdated pass", "resolve failure skips note edit", "No exception propagates"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the new setting in docs/docs/tools/improve.md next to persistent_inline_comments.

**Files:**
- docs/docs/tools/improve.md

**Verify:** `grep -n resolve_outdated_inline_comments docs/docs/tools/improve.md` → match found.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/docs/tools/improve.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n resolve_outdated_inline_comments docs/docs/tools/improve.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docs/docs/tools/improve.md documents resolve_outdated_inline_comments with default, dependency on persistent_inline_comments, and manual-unresolve opt-out"]}
```
